visa_type_detail.description: Permits for roles where a critical skills or strategic skills employment permit is not available.
For occupations where there is a shortage of skills in Ireland.
For specific high-value roles and multinational companies.
For employees transferring within the same multinational company.
For roles that are critical for the establishment or operation of a business.
For dependants, partners, or spouses of certain employment permit holders.
For individuals who have previously held an employment permit and wish to return to work in Ireland.
This appears to be a Canadian program and not relevant to Irish employment permits.
This refers to a type of immigration permission that allows individuals to work without a permit, not an employment permit itself.

data.processing_time: An application for any employment permit must be received at least 12 weeks before the proposed employment start date.

essential_apps.description: Ireland's digital identity app for accessing public services online.
The Health Service Executive (HSE) app for accessing health services and information in Ireland.
Official app for planning public transport journeys and purchasing tickets across Ireland.
A popular digital banking app with international money transfer capabilities widely used in Ireland.
Another well-used European digital bank with a strong presence in Ireland for convenient banking.
